description: Receipt in Arabic script (waṣala ilā bayt al-māl al-maʿmūr) in the name of Ibrāhīm b. Sunbāṭ al-Ṣabbāgh (the dyer), the Maghribī Jew, dated Ramaḍān 442, with the funds being delivered by Aḥmad b. Muḥammad b. Yaḥyā; ʿalāma on recto and a detailed registration in the dīwān al-jawālī of Fustat (!) on verso and witnesses' signatures.
tags: aodeh, fiscal receipt, tax receipt, registration mark, 'alama
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בNLI.
